title: LFU Cache
description: LFU Cache: get/put O(1); evict least frequently used; tie-break LRU among same freq.

examples.input: LFUCache(2), put(1,1), put(2,2), get(1), put(3,3), get(2), get(3)

approach: key→(val,freq,iter); freq→OrderedDict keys; minFreq pointer; inc freq move bucket.
memoryTip: Hash + freq buckets doubly linked — like 432 AllOne + value.

solutions.python:
class LFUCache:
    def __init__(self, capacity: int):
        self.cap = capacity
        self.kv = {}
        self.freq = defaultdict(OrderedDict)
        self.minf = 0
    def _touch(self, key):
        val, f = self.kv[key]
        del self.freq[f][key]
        if not self.freq[f] and f == self.minf: self.minf += 1
        f += 1
        self.freq[f][key] = None
        self.kv[key] = (val, f)
    def get(self, key: int) -> int:
        if key not in self.kv: return -1
        self._touch(key)
        return self.kv[key][0]
    def put(self, key: int, value: int) -> None:
        if self.cap == 0: return
        if key in self.kv:
            self.kv[key] = (value, self.kv[key][1])
            self._touch(key); return
        if len(self.kv) == self.cap:
            ev, _ = self.freq[self.minf].popitem(last=False)
            del self.kv[ev]
        self.kv[key] = (value, 1)
        self.freq[1][key] = None
        self.minf = 1

analysis.correctness: Freq buckets + minFreq track eviction target; get increments freq.
